title: Pelagic stop condition reached: hard/critical clear, no curation claim opened
body: Team-start/stop report: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b re-grounded with start-right-team and consolidate-docs; watcher session 9260 and heartbeat session 65615 live during verification; inherited working tree non-clean with active peer substrate and Charcoal/Mistbound/Lunar/Misty lanes visible; intended boundary was knowledge-surface curation only if critical or hard remained. Live validation says practice:fitness:informational = SOFT (19 soft), practice:fitness --strict-hard = SOFT (19 soft), collaboration-state check = ok. Per owner stop condition, I am not opening a curation claim and am stopping rather than processing soft surfaces.
